title.en: The EHT PHY: Overview, Functions and PPDU Formats
title.zh: EHT PHY：概览、功能与 PPDU 格式

blocks.en: Clause 36 of IEEE Std 802.11be-2024 defines the Extremely High Throughput (EHT) PHY — the physical layer that powers Wi-Fi 7. Like every generation before it, EHT is an OFDM system, and it does not start from scratch: it is layered on top of the High Efficiency (HE) PHY of Clause 27 (Wi-Fi 6), which in turn rests on VHT (Clause 21), HT (Clause 19) and the original OFDM PHY (Clause 17/18). An EHT station must still transmit and receive PPDUs that meet the mandatory requirements of those earlier clauses, so a Wi-Fi 7 radio is also a fully capable Wi-Fi 6/5/4 radio.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.11be-2024 的第 36 章定义了极高吞吐量（EHT）PHY——这是支撑 Wi-Fi 7 的物理层。与之前每一代一样，EHT 也是一个 OFDM 系统，而且它并非从零开始：它构建在第 27 章的高效率（HE）PHY（Wi-Fi 6）之上，而 HE 又依次建立在 VHT（第 21 章）、HT（第 19 章）以及最初的 OFDM PHY（第 17/18 章）之上。EHT 站点仍必须能够收发符合这些早期章节强制要求的 PPDU，因此一台 Wi-Fi 7 收发机同时也是一台功能完整的 Wi-Fi 6/5/4 收发机。

blocks.en: What does the EHT PHY add on top of HE? It introduces the headline Wi-Fi 7 capabilities: channel bandwidths up to 320 MHz (via the new 4x996-tone RU), 4096-QAM (4K-QAM) constellations carried by the new EHT-MCS 12 and 13, and multi-RU (MRU) operation, where two or more resource units in certain combinations are assigned to a single station. It keeps and extends OFDMA and MU-MIMO from HE — up to 8 users on a resource unit, with up to 4 spatial streams per user and at most 8 streams total — and adds preamble puncturing of an EHT MU PPDU for both OFDMA and non-OFDMA transmissions.
blocks.zh: EHT PHY 在 HE 的基础上增加了什么？它引入了 Wi-Fi 7 的标志性能力：高达 320 MHz 的信道带宽（通过新的 4×996 子载波 RU 实现）、由新的 EHT-MCS 12 和 13 承载的 4096-QAM（4K-QAM）星座，以及多资源单元（MRU）操作——即把若干特定组合的资源单元分配给单个站点。它保留并扩展了来自 HE 的 OFDMA 与 MU-MIMO——一个资源单元上最多支持 8 个用户、每用户最多 4 条空间流、总计不超过 8 条流——并增加了对 EHT MU PPDU 的前导码打孔（preamble puncturing），同时适用于 OFDMA 与非 OFDMA 传输。

blocks.en: The EHT PHY reuses HE's subcarrier spacing exactly (a quarter of the VHT/HT spacing). The Data field uses a 12.8 us DFT period with 0.8/1.6/3.2 us guard intervals, while the pre-EHT (legacy) preamble fields keep the 3.2 us DFT period so older radios can still decode them. That shared tone grid is precisely why Wi-Fi 7 slots cleanly on top of Wi-Fi 6 silicon and airtime.
blocks.zh: EHT PHY 完全沿用了 HE 的子载波间隔（为 VHT/HT 间隔的四分之一）。数据字段采用 12.8 微秒的 DFT 周期，搭配 0.8/1.6/3.2 微秒的保护间隔；而 pre-EHT（传统）前导码字段保持 3.2 微秒的 DFT 周期，以便较老的收发机仍能解码它们。正是这一共享的子载波网格，使 Wi-Fi 7 能够干净地叠加在 Wi-Fi 6 的芯片与空口之上。

blocks.en: The Scope of the EHT PHY (36.1.2) is described as two protocol functions offered to the MAC: first, a function that maps a PSDU received from the MAC into a PPDU for transmission to one or more receiving stations; second, a function that defines how data is actually transmitted and received over the wireless medium between two or more stations — stations that may be a mixture of EHT, HE, VHT, HT and legacy OFDM PHYs. That second clause is the formal hook for backward compatibility.
blocks.zh: EHT PHY 的范围（36.1.2）被描述为向 MAC 提供的两个协议功能：其一，将从 MAC 收到的 PSDU 映射为 PPDU，以便发送给一个或多个接收站点的功能；其二，定义在两个或多个站点之间如何在无线媒介上实际收发数据的功能——这些站点可能是 EHT、HE、VHT、HT 与传统 OFDM PHY 的混合体。第二个功能正是向后兼容性在标准中的正式落点。

blocks.en: The EHT PHY functions (36.1.3) split the layer into two functional entities: the PHY function itself (described in 36.3) and the physical layer management entity, the PLME (36.4), which manages the local PHY functions together with the MLME. The PHY service is delivered to the MAC through the standard PHY service primitives of Clause 8, exposed via the EHT PHY service interface described in 36.2. As is customary in 802.11, the figures and state diagrams are models for clarity, not mandatory implementations — they specify the abstract service, independent of any particular hardware.
blocks.zh: EHT PHY 功能（36.1.3）把该层划分为两个功能实体：PHY 功能本身（在 36.3 中描述）以及物理层管理实体 PLME（36.4），后者与 MLME 一起管理本地 PHY 功能。PHY 服务通过第 8 章的标准 PHY 服务原语提供给 MAC，并由 36.2 中描述的 EHT PHY 服务接口对外暴露。如同 802.11 的惯例，图与状态图只是为清晰起见而给出的模型，并非强制的实现方式——它们规定的是与任何具体硬件无关的抽象服务。

blocks.en: The PPDU formats (36.1.4) are selected by the FORMAT parameter in the transmit vector (TXVECTOR), Table 36-1. EHT defines two brand-new formats of its own: the EHT MU PPDU (EHT_MU), which carries one or more PSDUs to one or more users (downlink SU, DL-OFDMA, or DL MU-MIMO), and the EHT TB PPDU (EHT_TB), which carries a single PSDU and is sent uplink in response to a triggering frame. Alongside these, the same FORMAT enumeration can still select NON_HT, HT_MF, HT_GF, VHT, HE_SU, HE_ER_SU, HE_MU and HE_TB — every legacy format lives in the same dispatch table.
blocks.zh: PPDU 格式（36.1.4）由发送向量（TXVECTOR）中的 FORMAT 参数选择，见表 36-1。EHT 定义了两种全新的自有格式：EHT MU PPDU（EHT_MU），向一个或多个用户承载一个或多个 PSDU（下行 SU、DL-OFDMA 或 DL MU-MIMO）；以及 EHT TB PPDU（EHT_TB），承载单个 PSDU，并作为对触发帧的响应而上行发送。除此之外，同一个 FORMAT 枚举仍可选择 NON_HT、HT_MF、HT_GF、VHT、HE_SU、HE_ER_SU、HE_MU 和 HE_TB——每一种传统格式都存在于同一张分发表中。

blocks.en:
graph TD
  TX["MAC: PHY-TXSTART.request (TXVECTOR)"] --> F{"FORMAT?"}
  F -->|EHT_MU / EHT_TB| EHT["Clause 36 EHT transmit"]
  F -->|HE_SU/ER/MU/TB| HE["Clause 27 (HE)"]
  F -->|VHT| VHT["Clause 21 (VHT)"]
  F -->|HT_MF / HT_GF| HT["Clause 19 (HT)"]
  F -->|NON_HT| LEG["Clause 15/16/17/18"]
blocks.zh:
graph TD
  TX["MAC：PHY-TXSTART.request (TXVECTOR)"] --> F{"FORMAT？"}
  F -->|EHT_MU / EHT_TB| EHT["第 36 章 EHT 发送"]
  F -->|HE_SU/ER/MU/TB| HE["第 27 章 (HE)"]
  F -->|VHT| VHT["第 21 章 (VHT)"]
  F -->|HT_MF / HT_GF| HT["第 19 章 (HT)"]
  F -->|NON_HT| LEG["第 15/16/17/18 章"]

blocks.en: How does one PHY support so many formats? Clause 36.2.6 spells it out: when an EHT station operates on a band applicable to an older PHY clause, it logically contains all of the Clause 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 21 and 27 PHYs inside it. The MAC always talks to the single Clause 36 PHY service interface, and that interface routes each request to the right inner PHY based on FORMAT. On transmit, an EHT_MU/EHT_TB request runs the Clause 36 procedure; a VHT request is dispatched into the Clause 21 procedure; an HT request into Clause 19; and so on. On receive, a format-detection step inspects the incoming preamble and hands the PPDU to the matching inner PHY.
blocks.zh: 一个 PHY 如何支持如此多的格式？36.2.6 节给出了答案：当 EHT 站点工作在适用于某个较老 PHY 章节的频段上时，它在逻辑上把第 15、16、17、18、19、21 和 27 章的所有 PHY 都包含在自身之内。MAC 始终只与单一的第 36 章 PHY 服务接口交互，而该接口会根据 FORMAT 把每个请求路由到正确的内部 PHY。在发送侧，EHT_MU/EHT_TB 请求走第 36 章流程；VHT 请求被分派进第 21 章流程；HT 请求进第 19 章；依此类推。在接收侧，格式检测步骤会检视进入的前导码，并将 PPDU 交给匹配的内部 PHY。

blocks.en: One important consolidation: CCA. The PHY-CCA and PHY-CCARESET primitives from all the older clauses are unused inside an EHT STA — clear channel assessment requirements are defined once, in Clause 36, for every format. Likewise the inner PHYs are configured (via PHY-CONFIG) but with their wide-bandwidth parameters such as CHANNEL_WIDTH and DISABLED_SUBCHANNEL_BITMAP suppressed, because 320 MHz and puncturing are EHT-only concepts. A VHT or HE inner PHY asked to operate at 320 MHz is simply told 160 MHz on the primary 160 MHz channel.
blocks.zh: 一个重要的归并是 CCA（空闲信道评估）。在 EHT 站点内部，来自所有较老章节的 PHY-CCA 与 PHY-CCARESET 原语都不再使用——空闲信道评估要求只在第 36 章中统一定义一次，适用于所有格式。同样地，内部 PHY 会被配置（通过 PHY-CONFIG），但其宽带参数（如 CHANNEL_WIDTH 和 DISABLED_SUBCHANNEL_BITMAP）被抑制，因为 320 MHz 与打孔是 EHT 独有的概念。被要求在 320 MHz 下工作的 VHT 或 HE 内部 PHY，只会被告知在主 160 MHz 信道上以 160 MHz 工作。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 420 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="150" y="10" width="120" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="210" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">MAC</text><line x1="210" y1="40" x2="210" y2="60"/><rect x="110" y="60" width="200" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="210" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">Clause 36 PHY service interface</text><line x1="50" y1="90" x2="50" y2="130"/><line x1="130" y1="90" x2="130" y2="130"/><line x1="210" y1="90" x2="210" y2="130"/><line x1="290" y1="90" x2="290" y2="130"/><line x1="370" y1="90" x2="370" y2="130"/><line x1="50" y1="90" x2="370" y2="90"/><rect x="20" y="130" width="60" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="50" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">non-HT</text><rect x="100" y="130" width="60" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="130" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">HT</text><rect x="180" y="130" width="60" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="210" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">VHT</text><rect x="260" y="130" width="60" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="290" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">HE</text><rect x="340" y="130" width="60" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="370" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">EHT</text><text x="210" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" stroke="none">inner PHYs (Clause 15/16/17/18/19/21/27/36)</text></svg>

caption.en: An EHT STA logically contains every legacy PHY; the MAC sees only the single Clause 36 service interface, which routes each PPDU to the right inner PHY by FORMAT.
caption.zh: EHT 站点在逻辑上包含每一种传统 PHY；MAC 只看到单一的第 36 章服务接口，由它按 FORMAT 把每个 PPDU 路由到正确的内部 PHY。

summary.en: Coverage map: the five clauses this lesson teaches
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：本课讲解的五个条款

blocks.en: This lesson teaches clause 36.1 of IEEE Std 802.11be-2024 plus the backward-compatibility subclause 36.2.6. (1) 36.1.1 Introduction to the EHT PHY — EHT is an OFDM system layered on HE/VHT/HT/OFDM, with mandatory support of the earlier clauses, plus the new capabilities: 320 MHz, 4096-QAM (EHT-MCS 12/13), 26..4x996-tone RUs and MRUs, OFDMA, up to 8-user MU-MIMO, and preamble puncturing. (2) 36.1.2 Scope — the two PHY protocol functions offered to the MAC (PSDU-to-PPDU mapping, and transmit/receive over the medium among a mixture of PHYs). (3) 36.1.3 EHT PHY functions — the PHY function and the PLME, the Clause 8 service primitives, and the service-specification method (models are illustrative, not implementations). (4) 36.1.4 PPDU formats — the FORMAT parameter and its values, defining the new EHT_MU and EHT_TB formats alongside NON_HT, HT_MF, HT_GF, VHT and the four HE formats. (5) 36.2.6 Support for non-HT, HT, VHT, and HE formats — the EHT STA logically contains the older PHYs (Figures 36-1/36-2/36-3), the Clause 36 interface dispatches by FORMAT on transmit and by format detection on receive, wide-bandwidth PHYCONFIG parameters are suppressed for inner PHYs, 320 MHz is mapped to the primary 160 MHz, and CCA is defined only in Clause 36.
blocks.zh: 本课讲解 IEEE Std 802.11be-2024 的 36.1 节，外加向后兼容子条款 36.2.6。（1）36.1.1《EHT PHY 简介》——EHT 是一个叠加在 HE/VHT/HT/OFDM 之上的 OFDM 系统，强制支持较早章节，并新增了：320 MHz、4096-QAM（EHT-MCS 12/13）、26 至 4×996 子载波的 RU 与 MRU、OFDMA、最多 8 用户的 MU-MIMO，以及前导码打孔。（2）36.1.2《范围》——向 MAC 提供的两个 PHY 协议功能（PSDU 到 PPDU 的映射，以及在多种 PHY 混合的站点之间通过媒介收发）。（3）36.1.3《EHT PHY 功能》——PHY 功能与 PLME、第 8 章的服务原语，以及服务规范方法（模型是示意性的，并非实现）。（4）36.1.4《PPDU 格式》——FORMAT 参数及其取值，定义了新的 EHT_MU 与 EHT_TB 格式，以及 NON_HT、HT_MF、HT_GF、VHT 和四种 HE 格式。（5）36.2.6《对 non-HT、HT、VHT 与 HE 格式的支持》——EHT 站点在逻辑上包含较老的 PHY（图 36-1/36-2/36-3），第 36 章接口在发送时按 FORMAT 分派、在接收时按格式检测分派，宽带 PHYCONFIG 参数对内部 PHY 被抑制，320 MHz 被映射到主 160 MHz，并且 CCA 仅在第 36 章中定义。

cites.note: 36.1.1 Introduction to the EHT PHY — OFDM system layered on HE/VHT/HT, 320 MHz, 4096-QAM (EHT-MCS 12/13), RUs/MRUs, OFDMA, MU-MIMO up to 8 users, preamble puncturing, EHT MU and EHT TB
36.1.2 Scope (two PHY protocol functions) and 36.1.3 EHT PHY functions (PHY function + PLME, Clause 8 primitives, service-specification method)
36.1.4 PPDU formats — FORMAT parameter values incl. EHT_MU, EHT_TB; 36.2.1 service interface; Table 36-1 TXVECTOR/RXVECTOR
36.2.6 Support for non-HT, HT, VHT, and HE formats — EHT STA logically contains older PHYs, Figures 36-1/36-2/36-3, FORMAT dispatch, 320 MHz to primary 160 MHz, CCA defined only in Clause 36
